title: The urban-rural digital divide
subtitle: Individuals using the Internet (2025)
visdescription: A panel of four line charts, each showing the level of Internet access for urban and rural areas between 2022 and 2025, for each income region. The gap is represented by a shaded area between each pair of lines.

_meta.approvalNote: hand layouts; coverage_map is ranked-bars proxy not Mapbox
